modal.title: Google Authentication
modal.content: You must fill the fields above to use Google Authentication.

setting-page.nameInstructions: To change your name, fill the sections above to create a new full name.
setting-page.emailInstructions: To change your email, fill the section above to update your email.
setting-page.passwordInstructions: To change your password, tap your current password on the current password field and tap the new password to the fields new and confirm password, then save.
